title: Samsung 990 PRO 2TB PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD
content:
The Market Problem

High-end PCIe 4.0 storage prices have been creeping up steadily, making it painful to add fast storage to your gaming rig or PS5.

The Deal

Right now, the Samsung 990 PRO 2TB is down to an incredible $129.99. This is a top-tier drive pushing 7,450 MB/s, normally hovering around the $170 mark. At this price point, you are getting flagship performance for mainstream money.

What the Community Says

Users are jumping on this instantly. One buyer mentioned they "literally bought two to max out the motherboard slots," while another confirmed "it's the lowest price of the year for this specific SK." There's zero hesitation from the hardcore builders.

Should You Buy It?

Yes. Don't wait—drives like this at this price point tend to vanish into backorder oblivion within hours.
